title: Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions:
Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions!
